mapper.insert: INSERT INTO venue_section (venue_id, section_name, section_type, total_rows, seats_per_row, display_order) VALUES (#{venueId}, #{sectionName}, #{sectionType}, #{totalRows}, #{seatsPerRow}, #{displayOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT vs.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM venue_seat_template vst WHERE vst.section_id = vs.section_id) AS template_count FROM venue_section vs WHERE vs.venue_id = #{venueId} ORDER BY vs.display_order, vs.section_id
